_comment: Template for github_sync_config.json. Copy this to github_sync_config.json (which is gitignored) and fill in real values. The push layer reads from github_sync_config.json; this template file is committed only for shape reference.

_remote_url_examples.https_token: https://USERNAME:${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/USERNAME/REPO.git (NOT recommended; use a credential helper instead)

auth._token_env_var_doc: Name of the environment variable that holds a GitHub PAT or fine-grained token. Only consulted when method = https-token. The variable's value is read but never printed.

_homepage_doc: Optional. Used by the `meta` subcommand to set the repository's About-box homepage URL via the GitHub REST API. Defaults to https://tect.kr if absent.
_dry_run_default_doc: When true, every subcommand runs in dry-run mode unless --apply is explicitly passed. Recommended for first-time setup.
_force_push_doc: Hard gate. Both this AND --force-confirm flag are required for any --force-push. We use --force-with-lease (safer than plain --force) when the gate is satisfied.
